ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables the expansion and collapsing of the left sidebar on hover.
ast.target: 启用鼠标悬停时左侧边栏的展开与折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables the expansion and collapsing of the right sidebar on hover. Only collapses the right panel unless you have a right ribbon.
ast.target: 启用鼠标悬停时右侧边栏的展开与折叠。除非您有右侧功能区，否则仅折叠右侧面板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, hovering over the right sidebar will also expand the left sidebar at the same time, and vice versa. (Left and Right sidebar must both be enabled above)
ast.target: 如果启用，悬停在右侧边栏上时也会同时展开左侧边栏，反之亦然。（左右侧边栏必须在上方同时启用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, sidebars will slide over the main content without affecting the layout. When disabled, sidebars will expand by pushing content.
ast.target: 启用时，侧边栏将在主内容上方滑动，不影响布局。禁用时，侧边栏将通过推动内容来展开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, double-click to keep the sidebar open. Double-click again to unpin it.
ast.target: 启用时，双击可保持侧边栏打开。再次双击可取消固定。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, sidebar hover will only trigger when Obsidian is the focused application. Useful when using split screen with other apps.
ast.target: 启用时，仅当 Obsidian 是焦点应用程序时，侧边栏悬停才会触发。在与其他应用分屏使用时很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the number of pixels from the left edge of the editor that will trigger the left sidebar to open on hover (must be greater than 0)
ast.target: 指定从编辑器左边缘起多少像素处将触发左侧边栏在悬停时打开（必须大于 0）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the number of pixels from the right edge of the editor that will trigger the right sidebar to open on hover (must be greater than 0)
ast.target: 指定从编辑器右边缘起多少像素处将触发右侧边栏在悬停时打开（必须大于 0）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delay in milliseconds before the sidebar collapses after the mouse has left. Enter '0' to disable delay.
ast.target: 鼠标离开后侧边栏折叠前的延迟时间（毫秒）。输入 '0' 可禁用延迟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delay in milliseconds before the sidebar expands after hovering. Default is 200ms.
ast.target: 悬停后侧边栏展开前的延迟时间（毫秒）。默认为 200ms。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The speed of the sidebar expand/collapse animation in milliseconds.
ast.target: 侧边栏展开/折叠动画的速度（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the maximum width in pixels for the left sidebar when expanded
ast.target: 指定左侧边栏展开时的最大宽度（像素）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the maximum width in pixels for the right sidebar when expanded
ast.target: 指定右侧边栏展开时的最大宽度（像素）
